mapper.select: /* oms-master-orType-sql-oracle.xml selectOrTypeDt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , M.OWKEY , #{hddtdiv} AS HDDTDIV , M.ORDERTYPECD , M.ORDERTYPENM , A.COLUMN_NAME AS COCOLUMN , COALESCE(B.COMMENTS, A.COLUMN_NAME) AS COCOLUMNCOMMENT , COALESCE(C.REQRDYN, 'N') AS REQRDYN , C.DEFVAL , C.CDRFRNCTYPE , C.CDRFRNCVAL , COALESCE(C.DELYN, 'N') AS DELYN , C.INSERTDATE , C.INSERTURKEY , C.UPDATEDATE , C.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_MST_ORTYPE M JOIN USER_TAB_COLUMNS A ON A.TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} LEFT JOIN USER_COL_COMMENTS B ON A.TABLE_NAME = B.TABLE_NAME AND A.COLUMN_NAME = B.COLUMN_NAME LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_CHK C ON M.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND M.ORDERTYPECD = C.ORDERTYPECD AND C.HDDTDIV = #{hddtdiv} AND A.COLUMN_NAME = C.COCOLUMN WHERE M.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND M.ORDERTYPECD = #{orTypeCd} ORDER BY A.COLUMN_ID

/* oms-master-orType-sql-oracle.xml selectOrTypeInfoList */ SELECT A.ORDERTYPECD , A.ORDERTYPENM , A.ORDERAT , A.WMSIBTYPE , A.WMSOBTYPE , A.PERFMANSTYPE , COALESCE(A.WMSPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS WMSPERFMANSYN , COALESCE(A.WMSORDERCREATEYN, 'N') AS WMSORDERCREATEYN , COALESCE(A.POCALINCYN, 'N') AS POCALINCYN , COALESCE(A.OPENORDERYN, 'N') AS OPENORDERYN , COALESCE(A.IBYN, 'N') AS IBYN , COALESCE(A.OBYN, 'N') AS OBYN , COALESCE(A.SOYN, 'N') AS SOYN , COALESCE(A.EOSENDTYPE, 'AUTO') AS EOSENDTYPE FROM TORDER_MST_ORTYPE A WHERE DELYN = 'N'
